# TrustLens

> AI-powered social media comment moderation for Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram.

TrustLens helps teams detect, review, and act on toxic comments, cyberbullying, and harassment using configurable AI confidence scoring and automation rules.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Overview of moderation activity and comment trends.
- [Comments](/comments): Browse and bulk-moderate all captured comments.
- [Negative Comments](/negative): Filter and act on toxic comments by category and threshold.
- [Cyberbullying](/cyberbullying): Detect and manage harassment with AI confidence breakdowns.
- [Auto Moderation](/moderation): Configure automation rules, sensitivity, and schedules.
- [Blacklist](/blacklist): Review users blocked across platforms.
- [Reports](/reports): Visualize comment trends and moderation outcomes.
- [Translator](/translator): Translate comments across 100+ languages.
- [Settings](/settings): Manage platform integration credentials.
